title: DuHouse 10pcs Artificial Silk Roses Flowers Single Long Stem Fake Rose Bouquet for Wedding Home Party Decoration Centerpieces(Light Pink)
features: [Size] 10pcs long stem silk roses, total length 50cm, flower head diameter 5cm, flower head approx 6.5cm, with realistic green leaves.

[Material] Rose flower head and leaves are made of silk, look beautiful and just like real roses, metal wire as skeleton is wrapped by plastic which makes it bendable and easy to cut. Non-toxic color won't fade with time, perfect choice for pollen allergic people.

[Vivid] Lifelike artificial roses with stems, made of high quality soft silk material, are not easily deformed no matter how hard they are pressed. Vivid colour, blooming roses and clear texture leaves enhance the petals and flowers realistic effect, which bring the atmosphere of nature to room.

[Usage] Fake roses with stems are suitable for all festive occasions such as wedding, display center, party, gathering, home decoration, coffee shop decoration, etc. It can be given as a gift for Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, Thanksgiving Day, Christmas Day, Daily Meeting.
[DIY] You can freely combine different colors of flowers as you like to create vines, garlands, bouquets, wedding bouquets, cake decorations and home centerpieces.
description: Product Description DuHouse 10pcs Artificial Silk Roses Bouquet Long Stems for Wedding Home Party Decoration(14 different colors) Product Information Name : Artificial Silk Roses with Long Stems. Material : Silk flower&leaf+Plastic stems with thorns(contains iron wire). Size : Roses total length 50 cm. Flower head diameter 5cm. Flower head length 6.5cm. Color : White, Cream, Beige, Rose Red, Red, Burgundy, Pink, Orange, Champagne, Black, Blue, Yellow, Royal Blue etc. Package : Package including 10pcs silk roses. We bend each stem to fit the packaging bag,please fume them with vapour and arrange the flowers and leaves after received them. Tips : In order to better fit vases of different heights or different scenes, our rose stems are made longer, with a stem length of about 44cm. The plastic stems contain wire, which can be bended, snipped to fit your vase or bouquet. Use Silk Rose The flower head contains foam, no need to worry about being crushed during transportation. The outer petals are made of high quality fabric,vivid and beautiful. The part of the rhizome contains wire to bend at will, the curved part of the flower head does not contain wire, which can make the flower head look more natural. The stems have thorns made of plastic to make the flowers more realistic. Indoor and outdoor can be used, not easy to fade. The flower rhizome you received has a bend to fit into the bag, don't worry, all you need to do is fold it in the opposite direction and try a few more times to get it straight.
